caption: A young man with blond hair, wearing glasses, a blue t-shirt, and white over-ear headphones, is positioned in a room with a white brick wall and a decorative Christmas tree. He appears surprised, with his mouth open in an expression of disbelief. Overlaid on the footage is a series of white text captions that change from "WHAT: 2" to "WHAT: 3" and finally to "WHAT: 4". Accompanying this is a digital sports card for a player named "DEXTER LAWRENCE II" who plays the "TE" position and has a "90 OVR" rating. The card specifies "BLOCKING" as a trait. In the latter part of the clip, the screen shifts to a split-view showing the man in a small window while the "DEXTER LAWRENCE II" card dominates the frame, accompanied by the word "Naughty" and the number "497" displayed in large white digits.
